name: sigittn-backend
description: Backend API para SIGITTN - Terminal de Transporte de Neiva

scripts.vapid:generar: node -e "import('web-push').then(m => { const k = m.default.generateVAPIDKeys(); console.log('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=' + k.publicKey); console.log('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=' + k.privateKey); })"
